_comment: FEEDS the weekly puller reads. ONLY published RSS/Atom feeds or APIs we are permitted to read. No scraping; robots.txt respected. Run discover_feeds.py to populate 'discovered' from the organizations already in the dataset, then promote good ones into 'feeds'. Verify each feed URL resolves before relying on it.
_notes: ProFellow's blog RSS is public; we read only the published feed, never the paywalled database.
Add university/funder feeds here only after confirming they publish a feed and permit reading it.
discover_feeds.py mines data/fellowships.json organizations for feeds automatically.
